scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,whatsapp,web -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @amigo/api" "npm run dev:worker -w @amigo/api" "npm run dev:whatsapp -w @amigo/api" "npm run dev -w @amigo/web"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @amigo/api && npm run build -w @amigo/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @amigo/api && npm run typecheck -w @amigo/web
scripts.check: npm run db:generate && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
